'''pachoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foetology|foetology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foetology|foetology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pachoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæcheyeth|pæcheyeth]] || [[word:pæcheyej|pæcheyej]] || [[word:pæcheyesh|pæcheyesh]] || [[word:pæcheye|pæcheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pachochoyoth|pachochoyoth]] || [[word:pachochoyoj|pachochoyoj]] || [[word:pachochoyosh|pachochoyosh]] || [[word:pachochoyo|pachochoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pachoyoth|pachoyoth]] || [[word:pachoyoj|pachoyoj]] || [[word:pachoyosh|pachoyosh]] || [[word:pachoyo|pachoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pachofyoth|pachofyoth]] || [[word:pachofyoj|pachofyoj]] || [[word:pachofyosh|pachofyosh]] || [[word:pachofyof|pachofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pachoyotho|pachoyotho]] || [[word:pachoyojo|pachoyojo]] || [[word:pachoyosho|pachoyosho]] || [[word:pachoyoko|pachoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pachoyoth|pachoyoth]] || [[word:pachoyoj|pachoyoj]] || [[word:pachoyosh|pachoyosh]] || [[word:pachoyo|pachoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pachoyothol|pachoyothol]] || [[word:pachoyojol|pachoyojol]] || [[word:pachoyoshol|pachoyoshol]] || [[word:pachoyokol|pachoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pachoyothotho|pachoyothotho]] || [[word:pachoyojojo|pachoyojojo]] || [[word:pachoyoshosho|pachoyoshosho]] || [[word:pachoyoko|pachoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pachoyothon|pachoyothon]] || [[word:pachoyojon|pachoyojon]] || [[word:pachoyoshon|pachoyoshon]] || [[word:pachoyokon|pachoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pachoyothoro|pachoyothoro]] || [[word:pachoyojoro|pachoyojoro]] || [[word:pachoyoshoro|pachoyoshoro]] || [[word:pachoyokoro|pachoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
